title: Resident Technical Officer (C&S & Archi)
description:
Responsibilities

  1. Assist Consultants/client/RE in the supervision and quality assurance of construction works on site
  2. Ensure that all installation methods and material used are in accordance with the contract drawings and specifications
  3. Liaise with the contractors/sub-contractorsin the coordination of site works
  4. Highlight discrepancies, feedback site progress and irregularities to Consultants
  5. Ensure the contractors maintain work safety, cleanliness and tidiness of the site
  6. Monitor project progress schedule and quality standards.
  7. Maintain and update site records on project progress.
  8. Ensure proper maintenance and updating of site documentation for ongoing works, site meetings, safety records, method statements, shop drawings, as-built submissions etc.
  9. Be familiar with and check all method statement and drawings (including authority submission and shop drawings) and to supervise works carried out on-site are in accordance to them.
  10. Carry out regular site checks on contractors & ensure compliance with health and work safety per MOM regulations.
  11. Inspect and monitor the requirement and quality of architectural finishing and interfacing, and to ensure all architectural works are executed in full compliance with approved plans.
  12. Inspect the quality of workmanship, materials, and samples delivered to site; initiate corrective actions for any non-compliance and report to the Resident Engineer (RE) or Qualified Person (QP) for materials not meeting specifications
  13. Inspect and supervise architectural, interior and external works

Requirements
- Degree or Diploma in design or construction related field from University/Polytechnic
- Minimum 5 years relevant local building construction experience as Architectural RTO
- Must have experience in Singapore construction and have capability to supervise architectural and interiors works

- Accredited with IES/ACES with a valid Resident Technical Officer Practicing Certificate is an advantage but not compulsory

- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills
- Expected to know the prevailing Building Control Act, Building Control Regulations, etc, and be conversant with all the requirements concerning supervision, quality control, reports and other documentation.
- Has an eye for details and resourceful

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
